title: Lleida, Catalonia — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Lleida, Catalonia: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Lleida is a city in Catalonia with a population of 140,000. A historic city in western Catalonia with a striking Gothic cathedral, a rich agricultural region, and affordable living.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
